segments.text: Because the forward and dash attack stances look similar
segments.original_text: 前とDAの姿勢というかポーズが似てるから

segments.text: But that nair spacing is clean and sends them up!
segments.original_text: 逆に空Nうまく引かれて上に飛んで
すごい良いベクトルだったんですが
その場回避を見ている

segments.text: Up tilt to up air - that's Robot's bread and butter!
segments.original_text: 上強空上 ロボットの十八番

full_text: Because the forward and dash attack stances look similar Oh! What's this? But that nair spacing is clean and sends them up! That's an incredible angle though... Reading the spot dodge Off the down throw Up tilt to up air - that's Robot's bread and butter!

corrections.rule: misheard: 空N(空中ニュートラル)

corrections.original: そのばかりを見ている
corrections.corrected: その場回避を見ている

corrections.original: 上強空へロボットの電火の砲
corrections.corrected: 上強空上 ロボットの十八番
corrections.rule: misheard: 空上, 十八番(おはこ)
